Container.Name: dc-bridge
Container.Overview: Custom bridge between Sonarr/Radarr, Jellyseerr, and AirDC++. Polls AirDC++ search results for active Jellyseerr requests and queues downloads (whole release folder including .rar/.sfv/.nfo/sample) into a complete-release source layout.
Container.Description: Custom service that drives AirDC++ from Sonarr/Radarr webhooks + Jellyseerr request status. Built locally from source — see the project repo (README + Dockerfile) for setup.

Config.Name: WebUI / Webhook port
Config.Description: Inbound webhook endpoint for Sonarr/Radarr and the bridge's own status/sync endpoints.

Config.Name: Log directory
Config.Description: Where the bridge writes its rotating log file (logging.log_file in config.yaml points here).

Config.Name: CONFIG_PATH
Config.Description: Where the bridge reads its config inside the container.
